steps.title: Parse the equation structure
steps.content:
The equation $15,600 = 3,600 + 240t$ represents:
Total price = Down payment + (Per-month amount × Number of months)

The problem states that 3,600 dollars is the down payment, and $t$ is the number of fixed monthly payments. This means $240t$ is the total of all monthly payments.

steps.title: Determine what 240 represents
steps.content:
If $240t$ equals the total monthly payments across $t$ months, then:
$$\text{Per-month payment} = \frac{240t}{t} = 240$$
So 240 is the fixed monthly payment. Comparing to the choices:
  • "The amount, in dollars, of the down payment": the down payment (3,600 dollars)
  • "The amount, in dollars, of each fixed monthly payment": each fixed monthly payment (240 dollars)
  • "The total amount, in dollars, paid for the car after $t$ fixed monthly payments": total of all monthly payments ($240t$)
  • "The total number of fixed monthly payments": the number of payments ($t$)
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
